label: Photos — Round Two
items: Plans can now carry a set of reference photos — inspiration shots, progress photos, anything you want to remember. Find the new 'Reference photos' section at the top of any plan.
Plant Doctor: mark up your photo before you analyse. Drop numbered markers on specific areas (yellowing leaves, bite marks) and add short labels. Markers are saved with the diagnosis in your History.
Set any photo as your plant's cover — visit a plant's Photos tab, hover any image, and tap the star to pin it as the plant's cover photo.
